description: Adonis is a healthcare technology company that provides AI-powered revenue cycle management solutions. Their platform uses machine learning to identify and address revenue leakage, automate claims processing, and prevent denials before they occur. The company focuses on helping medical practices improve their financial performance through intelligent automation.
value_proposition: Combines AI-driven intelligence with automation to help healthcare organizations maximize revenue capture, reduce denials, and improve overall financial performance without increasing staff workload.

key_learnings: AI-first approach to RCM showing strong market adoption
Predictive denial prevention more valuable than reactive denial management
Integration with existing EHR/PM systems essential
Focus on revenue intelligence not just automation
